exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels as of December 31, 2024
exhibits.notes: Lists all Curio franchisees with entity names, hotel names, addresses by state. States include AL, AZ, CA, CO, CT, DC, FL, GA, HI, IA, IL, KY, LA, MA, MI, MN, MO, NE, NV, NM, NY, NC, OH, OK, OR, PA, SC, SD, TN, TX, UT, VA, VT, WA, PR.

exhibits.name: List of Franchised Hotels Terminated, Canceled, Not Renewed or with Changes in Controlling Interest during 2024
exhibits.notes: Lists hotels that left or changed ownership in 2024. CA (Carte Hotel San Diego) and FL (The Ray Delray Beach) listed.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited financial statements for FY 2024, 2023, 2022. Auditor: CBH (Cherry Bekaert). Clean opinion. Balance sheets, income statements, cash flows, notes.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement and Addendum
exhibits.notes: Full form Franchise Agreement. 73 pages. Sections 1-16 covering definitions, grant, term, fees, obligations, marks, management, reporting, condemnation, transfer, termination, general provisions.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: State-specific modifications to Franchise Agreement. Includes addenda for states requiring franchise registration (CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, PR, RI, VA, WA). Estimated page range — exact boundaries within Exhibit D.

exhibits.name: Development Incentive Promissory Note
exhibits.notes: Form note for development incentives. Contingent liability repayable on early termination or transfer.

exhibits.name: Eforea Spa Amendment
exhibits.notes: Amendment for eforea spa franchise. Defines Gross Spa Revenue, spa obligations, training requirements, termination provisions.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brand Amendment
exhibits.notes: Amendment for Restaurant Brand license (StiR Creative Collective). Defines Trade Name, obligations, compliance with Restaurant Brand Guidelines.

exhibits.name: Guaranty of Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: Personal guaranty form. 4 pages. Required of hotel owner principals.

exhibits.name: Franchise Application
exhibits.notes: 2025 U.S. Franchise Application. Instructions, application letter, application form, ownership structure, hotel/site info, financial info.

exhibits.name: Information Technology System Agreement (HITS Agreement)
exhibits.notes: HITS Agreement (PEP) Version 6.2024. Governs OnQ system access. 25+ pages including main agreement, definitions, order documents, schedules (software maintenance, authorized equipment, Microsoft participation, form requests).

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents – Brand Standards
exhibits.notes: Curio Hotels Brand Standards Global TOC. Sections 100-2500 covering brand experience, guest services, rooms, F&B, recreation, meetings, facilities, marketing, accessibility/safety, F&B specs, design/construction.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents – Eforea Spa Operating Standards
exhibits.notes: Eforea spa guidelines TOC.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents – Restaurant Brands
exhibits.notes: Restaurant Brands Manual TOC. Rev. 1 – January 18, 2024.

exhibits.name: State Administrators and Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: Lists state franchise administrators and registered agents.

exhibits.name: State Addenda to Disclosure Document
exhibits.notes: 8 pages of state-specific addenda to the FDD. States: California, Hawaii, Illinois, Indiana, Maryland, Michigan, Minnesota, New York, North Dakota, Rhode Island, Virginia, Washington. Material overrides to franchise law provisions.

exhibits.name: Restaurant Brands
exhibits.notes: Lists current Restaurant Brands and supplementary trademark information.

exhibits.name: Lender Comfort Letter Forms
exhibits.notes: Two forms: (1) Lender Comfort Letter (11 pages); (2) Mezzanine Lender Comfort Letter (10 pages). Include estoppel, general release, cure period, and assumption provisions.

exhibits.name: State Effective Dates
exhibits.notes: Lists states requiring registration/filing (CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI) and effective dates.

exhibits.name: Receipts
exhibits.notes: 2 copies of detachable receipt for prospective franchisee.
